title: lasianthus longibracteatus
intro: Lasianthus longibracteatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the long-bracted lasiandthus or the long-bracted tea. This plant is traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lasianthus longibracteatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
